assertions.description: U1 (NCP1117ST50T3G_MountingTab) is identified as topology='LDO' with input_rail and output_rail populated. The SOT-223 LDO with VI/VO/GND pins is correctly recognized despite all rails being unnamed.
The complex Teensy35Mega schematic has 19 connectors, 3 switches, 3 capacitors, 1 diode (D_Small), 1 IC (NCP1117), and 1 battery — 28 total. All types are correctly classified.

INCORRECT: The analyzer emits a 'regulator_caps' observation claiming missing_caps for both the input rail (__unnamed_74) and output rail (__unnamed_78). However, C1 and C2 both connect to __unnamed_74 (U1 VI input), and C3 connects to __unnamed_75 (U1 VO pin 2). The analyzer tracks only pin 4 (the tab VO) as the output rail but ignores pin 2 (also VO), so it misses C3 on the output side. Both input and output capacitors are present; the observation is incorrect.
